_comment: Scenario probes for node_7_cancellation_handler.txt. Each scenario exercises a failure mode discovered during scaffold testing. Auto-loaded by node_audit_openrouter.py and the Haiku audit template.

scenarios.name: BK — post-cancel booking request: SIGNAL 1 must be STRICTLY SILENT

history.content: I need to cancel my appointment please.
Checking that now, one moment.
[smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "cancelled": true, "message": "Done — your appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else?"}
Done — your appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else?
Actually, can I book a new appointment for next week?

scenarios.expected_behavior: SIGNAL 1 fires: prior cancel in history + booking intent. STRICTLY SILENT — zero spoken text, call universal_router intent='wrap_up' only. FAIL if ANY spoken text appears (including 'One moment', 'I'll wrap this up', 'I'll transfer you', 'Of course', or any transition phrase).

scenarios.name: EA — PATH A: cue phrase MUST appear before silent tool call

history.content: Actually never mind — cancel the booking I just made.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PATH A fires: recent_booking_id and recent_booking_phone are set in DVs. MANDATORY PART 1: agent must speak 'Checking that now, one moment.' MANDATORY PART 2: call smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' with appointment_id and patient_phone from DVs. FAIL if agent calls smart_voice_agent silently (no spoken phrase) OR if phrase is spoken without the tool call.

scenarios.name: CF — confirmation confirmed: SILENT smart_voice_agent with appointment_id

history.content: I want to cancel my Thursday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 123456789012345, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with Rebekah. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_cf_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with Rebekah. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes please — cancel that appointment for me.

scenarios.expected_behavior: CONFIRMATION REQUIRED CONFIRMED (standard path). STRICTLY SILENT: call smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' with appointment_id=123456789012345 (extracted from the JSON in the tool result — not from the message text). FAIL if appointment_id is missing, wrong, or if any spoken text appears before the tool call.

scenarios.name: PW-D — policy warning declined: 'No problem.' + wrap_up MUST be simultaneous

history.content: I need to cancel my Monday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"policy_warning": true, "found_appointment_id": 111222333444555, "message": "There's a 24-hour cancellation policy — cancelling now will incur a fee. Would you like to proceed?", "session_id": "sess_pw_001"}
There's a 24-hour cancellation policy — cancelling now will incur a fee. Would you like to proceed?
No, actually forget it — I'll keep the appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: POLICY WARNING DECLINED. SIMULTANEOUS SPEAK+TOOL: agent MUST produce 'No problem.' AND call universal_router intent='wrap_up' in the SAME response. FAIL if 'No problem.' is spoken without the tool call, OR if the tool is called silently without 'No problem.', OR if neither appears.

scenarios.name: S8R — Signal 8 RESISTANCE: explanation phrase + smart_voice_agent MUST be simultaneous

history.content: I just want to move it, I don't want to cancel it

scenarios.expected_behavior: Signal 8 RESISTANCE fires: reschedule_mode='true' AND resistance language. MANDATORY PART 1: agent MUST speak 'To reschedule, I need to cancel the existing booking first — the new booking follows straight after.' MANDATORY PART 2: call smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' in the SAME response. FAIL if explanation phrase is spoken without the tool call, OR if tool is called silently without the explanation phrase.

scenarios.name: S8O — Signal 8 ORIENTATION: orientation phrase + smart_voice_agent MUST be simultaneous

history.content: I need to reschedule my appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: Signal 8 ORIENTATION fires: reschedule_mode='true' AND rebook/move language (no resistance). timeframe_raw is empty so phrase is 'I'll cancel your existing booking first, then we'll find you a new time. Checking that now, one moment.' MANDATORY PART 2: call smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' in the SAME response. FAIL if orientation phrase is spoken without the tool call, OR if tool is called silently without the orientation phrase.

scenarios.name: CRR — CONF REQUIRED CONFIRMED reschedule: 'Perfect...' + reschedule_to_book MUST be simultaneous

history.content: I want to reschedule my Thursday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 987654321098765, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_crr_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, go ahead.

scenarios.expected_behavior: CONFIRMATION REQUIRED CONFIRMED with reschedule_mode='true'. MANDATORY PART 1: agent MUST speak 'Perfect, let me find you a new time.' MANDATORY PART 2: call universal_router intent='reschedule_to_book' with appointment_id=987654321098765 (from found_appointment_id JSON field) and policy_confirmed='false' in the SAME response. FAIL if phrase is spoken without the tool call, OR if tool is called silently without the phrase, OR if appointment_id is wrong or missing.

scenarios.name: RTC-1 (new) — reschedule_to_book payload MUST include caller's stated target date/time

history.content: I need to reschedule my Thursday appointment.
Let's find your booked appointment first.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 555666777888999, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_rtc1_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, cancel it — can we do next Saturday, the 18th, instead?

scenarios.expected_behavior: CONFIRMATION REQUIRED CONFIRMED with reschedule_mode='true' AND caller names a new target time in the same message. MANDATORY PART 1: speak 'Perfect, let me find you a new time.' MANDATORY PART 2 (same response): call universal_router intent='reschedule_to_book' with payload containing appointment_id=555666777888999, policy_confirmed='false', AND timeframe_raw='next Saturday, the 18th' (or an equivalent capture of the caller's stated new day). FAIL if timeframe_raw is omitted from the payload, sent empty, or the tool call is missing.

scenarios.name: RTC-2 (new) — reschedule_to_book payload MUST explicitly clear timeframe_raw when caller only confirmed cancel

history.content: I want to reschedule my Thursday appointment.
Let's find your booked appointment first.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 111222333444999, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_rtc2_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, go ahead.

scenarios.expected_behavior: CONFIRMATION REQUIRED CONFIRMED with reschedule_mode='true'. Caller did NOT state a new date/time this turn — only confirmed the cancel. MANDATORY PART 1: speak 'Perfect, let me find you a new time.' MANDATORY PART 2 (same response): call universal_router intent='reschedule_to_book' with payload containing appointment_id=111222333444999, policy_confirmed='false', AND timeframe_raw='' (explicitly empty string — even though {{timeframe_raw}} currently holds the stale value 'this Thursday' from earlier in the call). FAIL if timeframe_raw is omitted from the payload, or if the stale 'this Thursday' value is sent instead of an explicit empty string.

scenarios.name: F3 — reschedule language with empty DV: maps to cancel flow, NOT orientation

history.content: I need to reschedule my appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: reschedule_mode DV is empty (not 'true'). SIGNAL 8 must NOT fire. Agent maps reschedule language to cancel flow via RESCHEDULE REFRAME and calls smart_voice_agent intent='cancel'. PASS if smart_voice_agent is called. FAIL if agent produces an orientation phrase ('I'll cancel your existing booking first...') AND the DV is clearly empty — acceptable if DV substitution is visible as empty string.

scenarios.name: DRO-1 (new) — plain-cancel SUCCESS: stated new time in the confirming message MUST trigger the rebook offer, not silent wrap_up

history.content: I need to cancel my Thursday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 222333444555666, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_dro1_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, cancel it — but I might come back next Saturday.
(silent — smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' called with appointment_id=222333444555666)
[smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "cancelled": true, "message": "Done — your Thursday appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else?"}

scenarios.expected_behavior: SUCCESS path, reschedule_mode is NOT 'true' (plain-cancel flow). The caller's confirming message named a new day ('next Saturday') alongside the cancel confirmation. Agent must (1) speak the SUCCESS message verbatim, then (2) ask a rebook-offer question referencing the stated day, e.g. 'Would you like me to check availability for next Saturday?', then WAIT — do NOT call universal_router intent='wrap_up' in this same turn. FAIL if the agent calls wrap_up immediately without offering, or asks about the wrong timeframe, or fails to speak the SUCCESS message verbatim first.

scenarios.name: DRO-2 (new) — plain-cancel SUCCESS: no stated time MUST skip the rebook offer entirely

history.content: I need to cancel my Thursday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 777888999000111, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_dro2_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, go ahead.
(silent — smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' called with appointment_id=777888999000111)
[smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "cancelled": true, "message": "Done — your Thursday appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else?"}

scenarios.expected_behavior: SUCCESS path, reschedule_mode is NOT 'true'. The caller's confirming message ('Yes, go ahead.') named no new time. Agent must speak the SUCCESS message verbatim, then call universal_router intent='wrap_up' in the SAME response — no rebook offer question. FAIL if the agent asks about availability/rebooking when no time was stated, or if wrap_up is skipped/delayed.

scenarios.name: DRO-3 (new) — rebook offer AGREED next turn: STRICTLY SILENT book_intent, zero filler

history.content: I need to cancel my Thursday appointment.
Checking that now, one moment.

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"confirmation_required": true, "found_appointment_id": 333444555666777, "message": "I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?", "session_id": "sess_dro3_001"}
I found an appointment on Thursday June 19 at 2pm with James. Would you like to cancel that one?
Yes, cancel it — but I might come back next Saturday.
(silent — smart_voice_agent intent='cancel' called with appointment_id=333444555666777)
[smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "cancelled": true, "message": "Done — your Thursday appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else?"}
Done — your Thursday appointment has been cancelled. Is there anything else? Would you like me to check availability for next Saturday?
Yeah, that'd be great.

scenarios.expected_behavior: DEFERRED REBOOK OFFER GATE matched last turn and the caller just agreed. STRICTLY SILENT: agent must call universal_router intent='book_intent' with payload timeframe_raw='next Saturday' (verbatim from the earlier confirming message) and produce ZERO spoken text — no cue phrase, no 'Sure', no 'Let me check', no 'One moment'. FAIL if any spoken text appears before or instead of the tool call, or if timeframe_raw is missing/wrong.
